title: Ability to Archive Folders
excerpt: We organize projects into folders with various boards and docs. It would be helpful to be able to archive a folder with all contents once a project is complete.

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: We organize projects into folders with various boards and docs. It would be helpful to be able to archive a folder with all contents once a project is complete.

posts.author: Jessica_BSP (Jessica Harrison)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! This would be great. If I want to “unarchive” something it would come back live in the same structure.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to see this enhancement as well. It would be very useful.

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml: Another vote to be able to support archiving Folders.

posts.author: tuckerlulus (Tucker Schmidt)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping in hopes this feature will be developed.
